heading: Omitted
label: 269b Omitted
notes: CodificationSection, acts , ; , ; , ; , , ; , , , which authorized appropriations for the Department of State for the fiscal years 1963 and 1964, not in excess of $50,000 per fiscal year, to meet the obligations of the United States as a member of the Inter-American Children’s Institute, has been omitted because the authorization has not been extended for later than the 1963 and 1964 fiscal years.May 3, 1928, ch. 48945 Stat. 487Sept. 21, 1950, ch. 976, § 1(a)64 Stat. 902July 27, 1956, ch. 75070 Stat. 696Pub.
